# Omar Al-Bakri

> Applied AI engineer combining hands-on agent systems and full-stack delivery with enterprise payments and commercial experience.

## Positioning

Omar builds applied AI systems end to end across Python and TypeScript. His work covers agent orchestration, retrieval, evaluation, integrations, data workflows, APIs, and user-facing product delivery.

He is open to senior applied AI, agent engineering, forward-deployed, architecture, and FinTech AI roles, as well as fixed-scope and fractional consulting. He is based in Thailand, works remote-first, is available immediately, and has unrestricted UK work authorisation.

## Selected work

- [CallScore](https://call-score.com): public AI product for evidence-backed creator intelligence.
- ruleIQ: AI compliance platform using graph and retrieval patterns.
- Helios: AI-assisted commercial workflow platform.
- thredOS: multi-agent workflow runtime for long-horizon work.

## Services

- AI Opportunity Audit
- Agent Prototype Sprint
- RAG and Evaluation Hardening
- FinTech GTM Automation
- Fractional Applied AI Lead
- Payments AI Advisory
